fields.label: Requirement Level
fields.description: Critical (40%), Required (40%), Recommended (20%) weight in completeness score

fields.label: Locale Specific
fields.description: If checked, attribute must have values for all supported locales

fields.label: Min Length
fields.description: Minimum character length for text attributes (0 = no minimum)

fields.label: Max Length
fields.description: Maximum character length for text attributes (0 = no maximum)

fields.label: Validation Message
fields.description: Error message shown when validation fails

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Additional notes or guidance for this attribute requirement
